programme.title: Steel Buddies 3
programme.desc: Michael Manousakis and his mechanics from the Morlock Motors workshop will not despise any military vehicle.These are enthusiasts who can boast a long list of excellent projects.

programme.title: Dual Survival 6
programme.desc: Two survival experts, a former commando and a master of a traditional survival school, test their skills in the most hostile corners of the world.

programme.title: Dual Survival Brazil
programme.desc: Two participants take on the challenge in the most difficult terrain in Latin America.They want to prove that skills and innovative approaches can ensure survival in extreme conditions.

programme.title: Sin City Tow
programme.desc: Tow truck drivers are on the hunt for cars that have been illegally parked in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Goblin Works Garage
programme.desc: Three eccentric mechanics, Jimmy de Ville, Ant Partridge and Helen Stanley, decide to reactivate the once great British engineering company, Goblin.Together they restore the most famous cars and motorcycles in the world.The designs they create are characterized not only by a unique appearance, but also by above-average performance and attention to every detail.This season, the trio faces the difficult challenge of starting and promoting their new business.Their goal is to attract new customers and create unique machines.

programme.title: HMS Ark Royal
programme.desc: The creators of the series look at the ship HMS Ark Royal, which is taking part in a special mission.For 5 months he will lead an international group during naval maneuvers in the Atlantic.

programme.title: Megatransporty 2
programme.desc: The second series of the program presenting the behind-the-scenes work of Polish drivers who sit behind the wheel of several-ton trucks and transport oversized loads.They have to endure a long separation from their family.

programme.title: Mighty Truckers
programme.desc: The series tells the story of representatives of not the easiest profession - drivers of large-size vehicles.It involves long working hours, frequent fatigue, huge loads, and busy roads.These are just selected obstacles that truckers struggle with every day.However, they do not complain.On the contrary, they love their job and would not change it for any other.Now they will tell themselves where the passion for covering subsequent sections of European roads comes from: in Germany, Italy and the Netherlands.

programme.title: Steel Buddies
programme.desc: Michael Manousakis and his mechanics from the Morlock Motors workshop will not despise any military vehicle.These are enthusiasts who can boast a long list of projects.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers 13
programme.desc: A program for classic car lovers.In each episode, Mike Brewer and Edd China struggle to restore a damaged vehicle.Their goal is to buy, renovate and sell a used car at a profit.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers 13
programme.desc: A program for classic car lovers.In each episode, Mike Brewer and Edd China struggle to restore a damaged vehicle.Their goal is to buy, renovate and sell a used car at a profit.

programme.title: Asphalt Cowboys
programme.desc: Short deadlines, unpleasant customers and long days on the road away from family and friends.This is what a driver's life is like.Despite many inconveniences, these road cowboys wouldn't trade their job for any other.

programme.title: Dual Survival Brazil
programme.desc: Two participants take on the challenge in the most difficult terrain in Latin America.They want to prove that skills and innovative approaches can ensure survival in extreme conditions.

programme.title: Steel Buddies
programme.desc: Michael Manousakis and his mechanics from the Morlock Motors workshop will not despise any military vehicle.These are enthusiasts who can boast a long list of projects.

programme.desc: Michael Manousakis and his mechanics from the Morlock Motors workshop will not despise any military vehicle.These are enthusiasts who can boast a long list of projects.

programme.title: Steel Buddies 5

programme.title: Steel Buddies 5
programme.desc: Michael Manousakis and his mechanics from the Morlock Motors workshop will not despise any military vehicle.These are enthusiasts who can boast a long list of projects.

programme.title: Steel Buddies
programme.desc: Michael Manousakis and his mechanics from the Morlock Motors workshop will not despise any military vehicle.These are enthusiasts who can boast a long list of projects.

programme.title: Sin City Tow
programme.desc: Tow truck drivers are on the hunt for cars that have been illegally parked in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Absurdy drogowe
programme.desc: In the program "Road Absurdities", Kamil Jaśkowski and Krzysiek Ruszała follow the trail of stupidity and lack of imagination of road workers and officials.The program's hosts go to Poland in a prototype siren with the symbol S201 to take a closer look at examples of incompetence.These include poorly placed signs, streetlights placed in the middle of the road and other places that make life difficult for drivers.The "Road Absurdities" series is an overview of places characterized by careless construction.Mostly, they are behind huge amounts of money spent lightly by officials.Non-functional communication infrastructure facilities are located both on highways, local roads and city streets.The presenters do not stop at showing them in front of the camera, but often intervene in offices, construction contractors and road managers.

programme.title: Absurdy drogowe
programme.desc: In the program "Road Absurdities", Kamil Jaśkowski and Krzysiek Ruszała follow the trail of stupidity and lack of imagination of road workers and officials.The program's hosts go to Poland in a prototype siren with the symbol S201 to take a closer look at examples of incompetence.These include poorly placed signs, streetlights placed in the middle of the road and other places that make life difficult for drivers.The "Road Absurdities" series is an overview of places characterized by careless construction.Mostly, they are behind huge amounts of money spent lightly by officials.Non-functional communication infrastructure facilities are located both on highways, local roads and city streets.The presenters do not stop at showing them in front of the camera, but often intervene in offices, construction contractors and road managers.

programme.title: All Girls Garage
programme.desc: Motoring enthusiasts invite you to the workshop.They deal with car repairs, renovations and tuning.Their skills and experience are equal to men.They will take on even the most difficult project.

programme.title: All Girls Garage
programme.desc: Motoring enthusiasts invite you to the workshop.They deal with car repairs, renovations and tuning.Their skills and experience are equal to men.They will take on even the most difficult project.

programme.title: Dual Survival 5
programme.desc: The adventures of former soldier Dave Canterbury and naturalist Cody Lundin.They present various ways of surviving in difficult situations.

programme.title: Custom Car Factory
programme.desc: Mechanics Kuba and Artur intend to renovate machines from World War II.The workshop participants will include: 'Kubusia', an armored car from the Warsaw Uprising, and a DKW NZ 250 motorcycle.

programme.title: HMS Ark Royal
programme.desc: The creators of the series look at the ship HMS Ark Royal, which is taking part in a special mission.For 5 months he will lead an international group during naval maneuvers in the Atlantic.

programme.title: Megatransporty 2
programme.desc: The second series of the program presenting the behind-the-scenes work of Polish drivers who sit behind the wheel of several-ton trucks and transport oversized loads.They have to endure a long separation from their family.

programme.title: Mighty Truckers
programme.desc: The series tells the story of representatives of not the easiest profession - drivers of large-size vehicles.It involves long working hours, frequent fatigue, huge loads, and busy roads.These are just selected obstacles that truckers struggle with every day.However, they do not complain.On the contrary, they love their job and would not change it for any other.Now they will tell themselves where the passion for covering subsequent sections of European roads comes from: in Germany, Italy and the Netherlands.

programme.title: Junkyard Empire
programme.desc: Andy made his fortune scrapping cars.He is assisted by his father Bobby and a team of eccentric associates.They renovate machines that previous owners threw into the trash.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers 16
programme.desc: Mike Brewer and mechanic Ant Anstead struggle to restore damaged vehicles.They want to renovate and sell a used car at a profit.When the car goes to the workshop, Edd restores its shine.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers 16
programme.desc: Mike Brewer and mechanic Ant Anstead struggle to restore damaged vehicles.They want to renovate and sell a used car at a profit.When the car goes to the workshop, Edd restores its shine.

programme.desc: Michael Manousakis and his mechanics from the Morlock Motors workshop will not despise any military vehicle.These are enthusiasts who can boast a long list of projects.

programme.title: Off the Hook: Extreme Catches
programme.desc: Professional wrestler Eric Young travels to various parts of the world and tries to catch the sea creatures inhabiting these places in various unusual ways.

programme.title: Off the Hook: Extreme Catches
programme.desc: Professional wrestler Eric Young travels to various parts of the world and tries to catch the sea creatures inhabiting these places in various unusual ways.

programme.title: Off the Hook: Extreme Catches

programme.title: Off the Hook: Extreme Catches
programme.desc: Professional wrestler Eric Young travels to various parts of the world and tries to catch the sea creatures inhabiting these places in various unusual ways.

programme.title: A2 - Abenteuer Autobahn
programme.desc: The highway from Berlin to Dortmund is one of the busiest in Germany.The program presents the people who make the route connecting the east and west of the country work like a Swiss clock.

programme.title: A2 - Abenteuer Autobahn
programme.desc: The highway from Berlin to Dortmund is one of the busiest in Germany.The program presents the people who make the route connecting the east and west of the country work like a Swiss clock.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers 15
programme.desc: A program for lovers of old cars.In each episode, Mike Brewer and Ant Anstead struggle to restore a damaged vehicle.Their goal is to renovate and sell a used car at a profit.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers 15
programme.desc: A program for lovers of old cars.In each episode, Mike Brewer and Ant Anstead struggle to restore a damaged vehicle.Their goal is to renovate and sell a used car at a profit.

programme.title: Będzie pan zadowolony 3
programme.desc: The authors of the program visit car workshops with a camera to observe the work of mechanics.Krzysztof Woroniecki will evaluate their actions.

programme.title: Będzie pan zadowolony 3
programme.desc: The authors of the program visit car workshops with a camera to observe the work of mechanics.Krzysztof Woroniecki will evaluate their actions.

programme.title: Kindig Customs
programme.desc: Dave Kindig runs the Kindig-It Design workshop.It designs, builds and modifies various vehicles for demanding customers.Creates unique machines.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers 2
programme.desc: In each episode, Mike and Edd struggle with restoring a damaged car.Their goal is to sell the renovated car at a profit.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers 2
programme.desc: In each episode, Mike and Edd struggle with restoring a damaged car.Their goal is to sell the renovated car at a profit.

programme.title: Misfit Garage
programme.desc: Former employees of Richard Rawlings open their own workshop.First, they need to develop a good reputation to attract customers and be able to become a real replacement for their former employer.
